arts.ttl: La Liga side turn to January swoop for Leeds United – Easier option than Nottingham Forest man
arts.sum: Real Betis are considering signing Leeds United’s Junior Firpo in the winter market, with a deal to take Alex Moreno from Nottingham Forest considered too difficult. That’s according to Wednesday’s edition of ABC Sevilla, who state Real Betis are keen on signing a new left-back. The La Liga side have Ricardo Rodríguez and Romain Perraud The post La Liga side turn to January swoop for Leeds United – Easier option than Nottingham Forest man appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leeds United January transfer activity compared to Championship promotion rivals
arts.sum: Leeds United have always maintained they expected to have a quiet January transfer window and so far, that has been the case. However, so far, his strike-force numbers have only depleted with Joe Gelhardt - who hadn’t played since October - securing a loan to Hull City.

arts.ttl: Leeds ace Wilfried Gnonto may have chance to fulfil Farke request vs Norwich
arts.sum: Wilfried Gnonto has expressed his delight at reaching 100 appearances for Leeds United but perhaps would have liked to mark the occasion with either a start or goal contribution. Gnonto has not started a match as the number 10 this season but Farke recently named him as one option who could do a job there.

arts.ttl: Georginio Rutter joins in Leeds United reaction to “incredible” player update
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Willy Gnonto came off the bench against Sheffield Wednesday at the weekend to make his 100th appearance for the club. Willy Gnonto makes 100th Leeds appearance v Wednesday, reacts on Instagram

arts.ttl: Leeds United ‘surprisingly emerge’ to sign Championship player – Burnley have decision to make
arts.sum: Leeds United are one of the clubs in the picture to sign Burnley’s Mike Trésor in the winter market. The attacking midfielder missed the first half of this season due to injury and came off the bench in Burnley’s FA Cup win over Reading earlier this month. That was his only appearance of this season The post Leeds United ‘surprisingly emerge’ to sign Championship player – Burnley have decision to make appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Late Leeds United injury call, new Gnonto task and Firpo decision
arts.sum: If not for his injury, Farke might have been tempted to rotate and start Gruev against Norwich. Farke says he is “carefully optimistic” that his issue is nothing sinister but it might be that he is not played from the start with one eye on Monday’s trip to Burnley.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Championship predictions including Leeds vs. Norwich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Norwich City.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Norwich City as Daniel Farke makes Manor Solomon decision
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is wary of the threat his former club Norwich City will pose tonight as Leeds United look to extend their unbeaten Championship run to 10 matches. A depleted Canaries team head to West Yorkshire aiming to get their play-off push back on track after losing to Sheffield United last time out.

arts.ttl: MATCHDAY LIVE: Norwich City U21s vs Hertha Berlin
arts.sum: Follow live updates from Norwich City under-21s’ meeting with Hertha Berlin in the Premier League International Cup.

arts.ttl: Update on Leeds United player’s foreign interest, contact made earlier in January
arts.sum: Leeds United midfielder Josuha Guilavogui has been subject to interest from Ligue 2 side Paris FC this month, but he is not expected to be heading out of Elland Road this month. Josuha Guilavogui was the man they turned to in response, penning a contract until the end of the season to add experience behind Joe Rothwell and Ao Tanaka, since then he’s not been called upon too often as Ampadu and now Gruev have returned to the side.
